scope: Structural reliability and safety, risk assessment and management, probabilistic methods in structural engineering, uncertainty quantification, stochastic finite element methods, system reliability, fragility analysis, performance-based engineering, life-cycle assessment, structural health monitoring for safety evaluation, Bayesian updating, Monte Carlo simulation, first/second-order reliability methods (FORM/SORM), load and resistance factor design, extreme value statistics, AI/ML for reliability analysis.

manuscript_structure.abstract_note: A concise and factual abstract stating objectives, methods, key results, and conclusions. No references or undefined abbreviations.
manuscript_structure.keywords_note: Specific, relevant terms. Avoid terms already in the title. Use established abbreviations only.
manuscript_structure.highlights_note: 3-5 bullet points, max 85 characters each including spaces. Convey core findings.
manuscript_structure.graphical_abstract_note: Optional but encouraged. If provided, use TIFF, EPS, PDF, or MS Office format.

formatting.file_format: Word (.doc/.docx) or LaTeX (elsarticle class). PDF not acceptable as source.

references.format: Numbered in square brackets [1] in order of appearance
examples: [1] A. Der Kiureghian, O. Ditlevsen, Aleatory or epistemic? Does it matter?, Struct. Saf. 31 (2009) 105-112.
[2] R.E. Melchers, A.T. Beck, Structural Reliability Analysis and Prediction, third ed., John Wiley & Sons, Chichester, 2018.
[3] S.-K. Au, J.L. Beck, Estimation of small failure probabilities in high dimensions by subset simulation, Probab. Eng. Mech. 16 (2001) 263-277.
references.formatting_rules: Author initials then surname. Article titles in regular text. Journal names in italics and abbreviated (ISO). Format: Journal Volume (Year) Pages. DOI required.

figures_tables.placement: embedded in text or end of manuscript
figures_tables.color_note: Free color for online publication. Ensure figures are legible in grayscale for print.

submission_notes.equations: Numbered consecutively, numbers in parentheses flush right
submission_notes.math_notation: MathType or Word equation editor, or LaTeX math environments
submission_notes.ethical_requirements: Original unpublished work, not under review elsewhere. Declaration of competing interest required.
